summary: Unified Auth System testing completed successfully. All 12 features tested and verified working: Customer/Admin/Partner login via unified /login page with role-based routing, /admin/login and /partner-login redirect to /login, logout clears all tokens and redirects to /login, no auto-redirect after logout.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified auth system fully working. All user types (customer, admin, partner) can login via single /login URL. Backend /api/auth/login checks both users and partner_users collections. Frontend uses getDashboardPath(role) to route to correct dashboard. clearAllAuth() removes all token keys. /admin/login and /partner-login redirect to /login.

customer_login_via_unified_login.details: Customer login via /login returns role=customer and redirects to /dashboard

admin_login_via_unified_login.details: Admin login via /login returns role=admin and redirects to /admin

partner_login_via_unified_login.details: Partner login via /login returns role=partner and redirects to /partner

admin_login_redirect.details: /admin/login redirects to /login (not a standalone page anymore)

partner_login_redirect.details: /partner-login redirects to /login (not a standalone page anymore)

customer_logout_clears_tokens.details: Customer logout clears konekt_token, token, userRole and redirects to /login

customer_no_auto_redirect_after_logout.details: After customer logout, navigating to /login does NOT auto-redirect to /dashboard

admin_logout_clears_tokens.details: Admin logout clears konekt_admin_token, token, userRole and redirects to /login

partner_logout_clears_tokens.details: Partner logout clears partner_token, token, userRole and redirects to /login

backend_customer_role_response.details: POST /api/auth/login with customer creds returns role=customer

backend_admin_role_response.details: POST /api/auth/login with admin creds returns role=admin

backend_partner_role_response.details: POST /api/auth/login with partner creds returns role=partner
